name: Carbene
description: The Carbene is a Bandit assault rifle variant tuned with Dahl-like handling. It trades some damage for better accuracy and recoil management, making it more dependable for controlled bursts than most Bandit rifles with wide spread.
notes: Obtained as a regular world drop from appropriate loot sources. Internally it is listed as "Carbinated Carbene", where the first word acts as a swappable prefix.
